purpose: Separate current product-readiness evidence from arXiv paper readiness, SCI validation readiness, and commercial deployment readiness.

gates.finding: The 25-company reference slice has local sources, wiki pages, and source-backed claims for every selected company.
The user-approved 25-row review layer is runtime-promoted, with five review-approved source-backed claims per group.
All current group auto-eval baselines pass with zero required failures.
Live DART/KRX/Naver answer-quality smoke passed 15/15 samples with 0 warnings and average score 100/100.
Human answer-review packet generated with 15 actual customer-facing samples. Human investment-research judgment is pending.
3 group-level expansion cleanup gaps remain outside the first-slice readiness gate.
The repository has enough bounded product evidence for an arXiv method/demo paper, provided the paper does not claim commercial readiness.

SCI-level validation still requires a stronger evaluation protocol, longer-run quality dashboard evidence, live API stability analysis, numeric consistency checks, and deployment/compliance boundaries.
Commercial v1 still requires deployment hardening, key/security policy, monitoring, disclaimers, human review of answer policy, and client-operation controls.

gaps.message: Some source provenance records are not matched to local files.
Some source provenance ledger records are not matched to local files.
Some sources have source-page metadata but not direct document-level URLs.

liveAnswerQuality.finding: Live DART/KRX/Naver answer-quality smoke passed 15/15 samples with 0 warnings and average score 100/100.

humanAnswerReview.finding: Human answer-review packet generated with 15 actual customer-facing samples. Human investment-research judgment is pending.

interpretation.currentProductStage: Stage 4 entry: live API connectivity and live answer-quality smoke checks pass, before expert-policy review and deployment hardening.
interpretation.arxivBoundary: Ready for a bounded method/demo paper if framed as a traceable harness reconstruction and multi-group reference slice, not as commercial investment-advice validation.
interpretation.sciBoundary: Not yet SCI-complete. SCI should use this product as the implementation substrate and add stronger evaluation, monitoring, and failure analysis.
interpretation.nextProductStep: Run human expert review of actual UI answers and then close nonblocking expansion provenance gaps, especially SK unmatched URL records, Hyundai unmatched ledger records, and LG source-page-only records.
